en_title: How to Play the God of War Games in Order
subtitle: 从希腊到北欧，一网打尽
opus_summary: 随着新作《战神：劳菲》在State of Play上公布，IGN整理了《战神》系列11款游戏的完整游玩顺序。从时间线最早的《战神：升天》到最新的《战神：斯巴达之子》，以及2018年重启作，为玩家提供从剧情连贯性出发的最佳入坑建议。文章详细介绍了每款游戏的剧情背景、关键角色和故事节点，帮助玩家理解奎托斯从希腊战神到北欧父亲的转变历程。

paragraphs.en: God of War’s Norse-set masterpieces has cemented it as one of PlayStation’s most iconic franchises . Born during the PS2 era, the God of War franchise made a name for itself with excellent action gameplay, an intriguing tale of divine revenge, and a memorable lead in the Spartan demigod Kratos. 20 years later, God of War has grown into gaming’s seminal action-adventure series, blending that increasingly fine-tuned action with deeper lore and a stronger narrative hook, anchored by an older, more empathic Kratos.
paragraphs.cn: 《战神》系列以北欧神话为背景的杰作，已将其巩固为PlayStation最具标志性的游戏系列之一。诞生于PS2时代的《战神》系列，凭借出色的动作玩法、引人入胜的神之复仇故事，以及令人难忘的主角——斯巴达半神奎托斯，一举成名。20年后，《战神》已成长为游戏界开创性的动作冒险系列，将日益精炼的动作系统与更深厚的世界观、更强的叙事钩子相结合，而这一切都围绕着一个更年长、更具同理心的奎托斯展开。

paragraphs.en: Now that we know the next God of War game will follow Faye in some overlapping timelines, we’ve created this chronology of the series for those interested in playing (or replaying) it from the start.
paragraphs.cn: 既然我们知道下一部《战神》游戏将跟随劳菲在部分重叠的时间线中展开，我们为那些有兴趣从头开始游玩（或重温）该系列的玩家制作了这份时间线指南。

paragraphs.en: Sony has released 11 God of War games in the series — seven on home consoles, two on portable consoles, one on mobile, and one text-adventure on Facebook Messenger. A twelfth game, God of War Laufey, was recently announced during a State of Play but does not yet have a release date.
paragraphs.cn: 索尼已在该系列中发布了11款《战神》游戏——7款家用主机、2款掌机、1款手机游戏，以及1款Facebook Messenger文字冒险游戏。第12款游戏《战神：劳菲》最近在State of Play上公布，但尚未公布发售日期。

paragraphs.en: We’re excluding its second mobile release, God of War: Mimir’s Vision, as this AR game doesn’t add to the ongoing narrative but instead provides players with background lore from the world of God of War. We’re also excluding PlayStation All-Stars Battle Royale in this chronology, despite its comical inclusion in the God of War canon .
paragraphs.cn: 我们排除了其第二款手机游戏《战神：密米尔的幻视》，因为这款AR游戏并未增加主线叙事，而是为玩家提供《战神》世界的背景设定。我们同样排除了《PlayStation全明星大乱斗》，尽管它被戏谑地纳入了《战神》正史。

paragraphs.en: There are several God of War stories told through novels and comics as well, though this list only includes games.
paragraphs.cn: 还有几部《战神》故事通过小说和漫画讲述，不过本列表仅包含游戏。

paragraphs.en: Although technically the first game in the series chronologically was God of War: Ascension, realistically you'll probably want to start with God of War (2018). Not only is it available on both PS4 and PS5, you can also play it on PC. It's a great starting point for anyone just getting into the series.
paragraphs.cn: 虽然从时间线来看，系列的第一款游戏是《战神：升天》，但实际上你可能更想从《战神》（2018）开始。它不仅登陆了PS4和PS5，还可以在PC上游玩。对于刚入坑的玩家来说，这是一个绝佳的起点。

paragraphs.en: These blurbs contain mild spoilers for each game, including characters, settings, and story beats.
paragraphs.cn: 以下简介包含每款游戏的轻度剧透，包括角色、设定和故事节点。

paragraphs.en: God of War Sons of Sparta is the latest game in the series, but chronologically it takes place before any of the others. Sons of Sparta acts as a prequel, following the story of Kratos and his brother Deimos as they undertake their brutal training as Spartans. The gameplay breaks fro mthe usual God of War formula in favor of a retro-inspired Metroidvania style.
paragraphs.cn: 《战神：斯巴达之子》是系列最新作，但从时间线来看，它发生在所有其他游戏之前。《斯巴达之子》作为前传，讲述了奎托斯和他的弟弟德摩斯接受残酷的斯巴达训练的故事。游戏玩法打破了《战神》的常规模式，采用了复古风格的类银河城玩法。

paragraphs.en: Ascension , the seventh God of War game by release date but the first chronologically, is a revenge tale that explores the early days of Kratos’s transformation from a Spartan demigod into the God of War.
paragraphs.cn: 《战神：升天》按发售顺序是第七款《战神》游戏，但按时间线却是第一款。这是一个复仇故事，探索了奎托斯从斯巴达半神转变为战神的最初阶段。

paragraphs.en: Ascension takes place months after Kratos was manipulated into killing his wife and daughter by the Greek God of War Ares (more on this under the original God of War section below). Kratos, traumatized by the killings, refuses to honor the oath he swore to Ares, setting into motion the story of Ascension. Ares seeks revenge through the game’s antagonistic Furies, three beings tasked with punishing betrayal, whom Kratos must kill in order to free himself from his oath. The story ends with Kratos leaving his Spartan home behind, still tormented by his grief.
paragraphs.cn: 《升天》的故事发生在奎托斯被希腊战神阿瑞斯操纵杀害妻女数月之后（更多细节见下文初代《战神》部分）。奎托斯因杀戮而深受创伤，拒绝履行他向阿瑞斯立下的誓言，从而引发了《升天》的故事。阿瑞斯通过游戏中的反派「复仇女神」来寻求报复，这三位女神负责惩罚背叛者，奎托斯必须杀死她们才能摆脱誓言。故事以奎托斯离开斯巴达家园告终，他仍被悲痛所折磨。

paragraphs.en: Kratos’s next adventure is told in the PSP game aptly named God of War: Chains of Olympus . Olympus takes place halfway through Kratos’s ten-year servitude to the gods (five years before God of War) — a servitude that, once completed, will free him from the torturous visions of his past.
paragraphs.cn: 奎托斯的下一段冒险发生在PSP游戏《战神：奥林匹斯之链》中。故事发生在奎托斯为众神效力的十年间（初代《战神》的五年前）——一旦完成这项服务，他将摆脱过去痛苦的幻象。

paragraphs.en: The main plot tasks Kratos with rescuing Helios, the Titan God of the Sun, from the underworld at the behest of Athena. There, he encounters the game’s primary antagonist Persephone, Queen of the Underworld. Persephone presents Kratos with an opportunity to reunite with his daughter, and Kratos wrestles with the apocalyptic repercussions of that reunion and his promise to return Helios to the gods.
paragraphs.cn: 主线剧情中，奎托斯受雅典娜之命，从冥界救出太阳神赫利俄斯。在那里，他遇到了游戏的主要反派——冥后珀耳塞福涅。珀耳塞福涅给了奎托斯一个与女儿重逢的机会，奎托斯在重逢带来的灾难性后果与归还赫利俄斯的承诺之间挣扎。

paragraphs.en: Set roughly 10 years after Ascension, the first God of War game begins with Kratos succumbing to his grief and jumping off a cliff into the Aegean Sea. Before he hits the water, we flash back three weeks to discover what led the Spartan off the brink.
paragraphs.cn: 故事设定在《升天》大约10年后，初代《战神》以奎托斯被悲伤压垮、跳下悬崖坠入爱琴海开场。在他落水前，画面闪回到三周前，揭示是什么让这位斯巴达人走向绝境。

paragraphs.en: Kratos, nearing the end of his servitude to the gods, is given one final task by Athena: defeat Ares and save the city of Athens from his siege. With the promise of forgiveness for his past atrocites as his reward, Kratos sets out to obtain Pandora’s Box and kill Ares. The task takes him to hell and back, with Kratos ultimately facing off against the God of War. Victorious yet no less troubled by his past, Kratos jump off the bluff as we saw in the game’s opening. Athena pulls him from the water and offers him a throne on Olympus, completing his 10-year ascension to becoming the God of War.
paragraphs.cn: 奎托斯即将结束对众神的效忠，雅典娜交给他最后一个任务：击败阿瑞斯，拯救被围困的雅典城。以赦免他过去的暴行作为奖励，奎托斯出发寻找潘多拉魔盒并杀死阿瑞斯。这项任务让他历经地狱般的磨难，最终与战神正面对决。尽管获胜，但奎托斯仍被过去所困扰，他跳下悬崖，正如游戏开场所示。雅典娜将他从水中救起，并赐予他奥林匹斯神座，完成了长达十年的晋升，成为新的战神。

paragraphs.en: Throughout the game, a narrator provides crucial backstory about Kratos’s life through cut scenes. Kratos once served as a revered captain in the Spartan army. On the verge of death and defeat against a massive force of barbarians, he offered himself to Ares in exchange for victory. Ares answered the call, defeated the barbarians, and claimed Kratos as his servant, fusing his arms with the Blades of Chaos .
paragraphs.cn: 在整个游戏中，旁白通过过场动画提供了关于奎托斯生平的关键背景故事。奎托斯曾是一名备受尊敬的斯巴达军队队长。在与一支庞大的蛮族军队作战濒临死亡和失败时，他将自己献给了阿瑞斯以换取胜利。阿瑞斯响应了召唤，击败了蛮族，并将奎托斯收为仆人，将混沌之刃与他双臂融合。

paragraphs.en: Ghost of Sparta , the series’ second PSP game, takes place between God of War and God of War 2. The subtitle references the nickname given to Kratos due to his pale-white appearance, the result of an oracle’s curse that fastened the ashes of his wife and child to his skin.
paragraphs.cn: 《战神：斯巴达之魂》是系列第二款PSP游戏，故事发生在初代《战神》与《战神2》之间。副标题指的是奎托斯因苍白外貌而获得的绰号，这是先知诅咒的结果，将妻女的骨灰永远附着在他的皮肤上。

paragraphs.en: Ghost of Sparta provides closure to two familial narrative threads: Kratos travels to Atlantis where he encounters both his mortal mother and his long-lost brother Deimos, who was kidnapped by the gods during childhood to prevent the fulfillment of Olympus’s prophesized demise.
paragraphs.cn: 《斯巴达之魂》为两条家庭叙事线画上了句号：奎托斯前往亚特兰蒂斯，在那里遇到了他的凡人母亲和失散多年的弟弟德摩斯——德摩斯在童年时被众神绑架，以防止奥林匹斯预言中的毁灭成真。

paragraphs.en: The climax sees Kratos and his brother reunited, doing battle with the Greek God of Death, Thanatos. Despite victory, it’s another unhappy ending for Kratos. By the time the credits roll, Kratos has grown even wearier and more furious with the other Olympians.
paragraphs.cn: 高潮部分，奎托斯与弟弟重逢，并与希腊死神塔纳托斯展开战斗。尽管获胜，但对奎托斯来说又是一个不愉快的结局。当片尾字幕滚动时，奎托斯对其他奥林匹斯神更加厌倦和愤怒。

paragraphs.en: This mobile 2D sidescroller is officially part of the God of War canon, according to Sony Santa Monica animation director Bruno Velazquez . The gods, displeased with Kratos’s bloodlust, attempt to stop his latest conquest with Argos, a many-eyed giant that serves Hera, Queen of the Gods. Kratos is framed for the killing of Argos by an unidentified assassin in an attempt to further fracture his relationship with Olympus. Later, Zeus sends a messenger to put an end to Kratos’s continued destruction. Kratos responds with violence, once again defying the other gods. Betrayal leaves players with this message, setting up the events to come in God of War 2: “Soon, the fury of Zeus would rain down upon [Kratos].”
paragraphs.cn: 据索尼圣莫尼卡动画总监Bruno Velazquez称，这款手机2D横版卷轴游戏正式属于《战神》正史。众神对奎托斯的嗜血不满，试图用百眼巨人阿耳戈斯阻止他最新的征服——阿耳戈斯是为众神之母赫拉服务的。奎托斯被一名身份不明的刺客陷害，被指控杀害了阿耳戈斯，旨在进一步破坏他与奥林匹斯的关系。随后，宙斯派出一名使者，要求结束奎托斯的持续破坏。奎托斯以暴力回应，再次违抗众神。《背叛》给玩家留下了这样的信息，为《战神2》中的事件埋下伏笔：「很快，宙斯的怒火将降临到[奎托斯]头上。」

paragraphs.en: God of War: Betrayal was released in 2007, before the rise of smartphones, and isn’t available on modern mobile storefronts. It can be skipped without consequence, but those who want to play it will have to access it via a Java emulator.
paragraphs.cn: 《战神：背叛》于2007年发布，早于智能手机的兴起，在现在的手机应用商店中已无法获取。跳过它不会影响剧情理解，但想玩的人需要通过Java模拟器来体验。

paragraphs.en: God of War 2 pits Kratos against Zeus, the King of Olympus. Kratos, already ostracized due to his yearslong rampage, rejects Athena’s plea for peace and continues wreaking havoc throughout Greece. It’s the final straw for Olympus; Zeus descends to the battlefield and kills Kratos.
paragraphs.cn: 《战神2》让奎托斯与奥林匹斯之王宙斯对抗。奎托斯因多年的暴行已被众神排斥，他拒绝了雅典娜的和平请求，继续在希腊各地肆虐。这成为压垮奥林匹斯的最后一根稻草；宙斯降临战场，杀死了奎托斯。

paragraphs.en: Kratos finds a new ally in Gaia, the mother of Titans and Earth. She provides Kratos with a way to rewrite the past and save his own life. After a trip to the Underworld, Kratos follows Gaia’s instructions, leading him to the Sisters of Fate. After more bloodshed, Kratos takes control of the Loom of Fate and returns to the scene of his death. Kratos’s plan to kill Zeus is thwarted when another Olympian steps in front of his blade. It’s here that we (and Kratos) learn about his true parentage. Kratos uses the power of the Loom to recruit the Titans of the past to his future war. Back in the present, Kratos leads the Titans in an assault on Mount Olympus, setting up God of War 3.
paragraphs.cn: 奎托斯找到了新的盟友——大地之母、泰坦之母盖亚。她为奎托斯提供了一条改写过去、拯救自己生命的方法。在前往冥界之后，奎托斯遵循盖亚的指引，找到了命运三女神。经过更多杀戮，奎托斯控制了命运之梭，回到了自己死亡的那一刻。奎托斯杀死宙斯的计划被另一位奥林匹斯神挡在刀前而受阻。正是在这里，我们（和奎托斯）得知了他的真实身世。奎托斯利用命运之梭的力量，将过去的泰坦招募到未来的战争中。回到现在，奎托斯率领泰坦进攻奥林匹斯山，为《战神3》埋下伏笔。

paragraphs.en: Taking place directly after the previous game, God of War 3 concludes Kratos’ Greecian saga and resolves his war with Zeus and the Olympians.
paragraphs.cn: 《战神3》的故事紧接前作，为奎托斯的希腊传奇画上句号，并终结了他与宙斯及奥林匹斯众神的战争。

paragraphs.en: Kratos and the Titans battle with the Olympians to catastrophic effect. Kratos (once again) has his trust betrayed and (once again) descends into the Underworld. There, Kratos teams up with an old ally to take down Zeus once and for all. Back on Earth, Kratos faces the wrath of Titans and Gods alike, leading him on an epic killing spree toward a final showdown with Zeus.
paragraphs.cn: 奎托斯与泰坦们同奥林匹斯众神展开了一场灾难性的战斗。奎托斯（又一次）遭到背叛，（又一次）坠入冥界。在那里，奎托斯与一位老盟友联手，试图一劳永逸地击败宙斯。回到人间，奎托斯同时面对泰坦和众神的怒火，开启了一场史诗般的杀戮之旅，最终与宙斯展开决战。

paragraphs.en: Kratos declares an end to his vengeance, and with the world in ruin, makes a sacrifice to release hope to mankind.
paragraphs.cn: 奎托斯宣布终结复仇，在世界毁灭之际，他做出牺牲，将希望释放给人类。

paragraphs.en: God of War: A Call from the Wids is a Facebook Messenger text-adventure released ahead of 2018’s God of War. The ~30-minute story introduces Kratos's son Atreus and provides background on the character's extrasensory abilities, while adding a bit of flavor to his relationships with Kratos and his mother, Faye. The story is set sometime before God of War 2018 when Faye is still alive.
paragraphs.cn: 《战神：荒野的呼唤》是一款Facebook Messenger文字冒险游戏，在2018年的《战神》之前发布。这个约30分钟的故事介绍了奎托斯的儿子阿特柔斯，并提供了角色超感知能力的背景，同时为阿特柔斯与奎托斯及其母亲劳菲的关系增添了一些色彩。故事设定在2018年《战神》之前的某个时间，当时劳菲还活着。

paragraphs.en: A Call from the Wilds seems to no longer be playable, though like God of War: Betrayal, this is a story that can ultimately be skipped. Those who want to experience it can find complete playthroughs on YouTube .
paragraphs.cn: 《荒野的呼唤》似乎已无法游玩，不过和《战神：背叛》一样，这个故事最终也可以跳过。想要体验的玩家可以在YouTube上找到完整的通关视频。

paragraphs.en: Set many years after God of War 3, 2018’s God of War transports Kratos from Greece to the Norse realm of Midgard, where Kratos now resides with his son, Atreus. Kratos and Atreus plan to fulfill Faye’s dying wish: to have her ashes spread from the top of the highest peak in the Nine Realms.
paragraphs.cn: 故事设定在《战神3》多年之后，2018年的《战神》将奎托斯从希腊带到了北欧的米德加尔特，奎托斯现在与儿子阿特柔斯居住于此。奎托斯和阿特柔斯计划实现劳菲的遗愿：将她的骨灰撒在九界最高峰的山顶。

paragraphs.en: Their journey is no straightforward hike; the duo travel through multiple realms, encountering friends and foes from Norse mythology, including Baldur, Freya, Thor’s sons Magni and Modi, the last living giant Jörmungandr, and Mimir. Along the way, Kratos struggles with fatherhood and the truths he keeps hidden from Atreus — about his past and Atreus’s identity.
paragraphs.cn: 他们的旅程并非简单的徒步；两人穿越多个国度，遇到了北欧神话中的朋友和敌人，包括巴德尔、芙蕾雅、托尔的儿子曼尼和摩迪、最后活着的巨人耶梦加得，以及密米尔。一路上，奎托斯在父亲身份和他对阿特柔斯隐瞒的真相——关于他的过去和阿特柔斯的身份——之间挣扎。

paragraphs.en: Following their adventure, the Nine Realms enter Fimbulwinter, a three-year-long precursor to Ragnarök, the end of the world.
paragraphs.cn: 在他们的冒险之后，九界进入了芬布尔之冬，这是世界末日诸神黄昏长达三年的前奏。

paragraphs.en: God of War: Ragnarok , the most recent 3D God of War game, is set three years after 2018’s God of War, as the Nine Realms near the end of Fimbulwinter and the beginning of Ragnarök.
paragraphs.cn: 《战神：诸神黄昏》是最新的3D《战神》游戏，故事设定在2018年《战神》三年后，九界即将结束芬布尔之冬，迎来诸神黄昏。

paragraphs.en: Many characters return from 2018, alongside newcomers such as the All-Father Odin and his son Thor , but it remains focused on the adventures of Kratos and Atreus with a greater emphasis on the latter, who explores his newly discovered identities and powers. As Kratos and Atreus, you’ll traverse all nine realms and the Realm Between Realms on personal quests of identity and a greater quest to defeat the Asgards and survive Ragnarok.
paragraphs.cn: 许多2018年作品中的角色回归，同时还有新角色如众神之父奥丁和他的儿子托尔，但故事仍聚焦于奎托斯和阿特柔斯的冒险，且更侧重于后者，他探索着自己新发现的身份和能力。你将扮演奎托斯和阿特柔斯，穿越全部九界和界间之地，踏上关于身份的个人探索，以及击败阿斯加德、在诸神黄昏中生存下来的更宏大使命。

paragraphs.en: We won’t spoil the journey, but Ragnarok leaves the door open for future God of War stories to be told. Though you can play the God of War Ragnorok New Game Plus mode if you've already finished the game.
paragraphs.cn: 我们不会剧透旅程，但《诸神黄昏》为未来的《战神》故事留下了空间。不过，如果你已经通关，可以尝试《战神：诸神黄昏》的新游戏+模式。

paragraphs.en: Sony officially announced the next God of War game at the most recent State of Play . God of War Laufey will star none other than Faye , Kratos' wife and Atreus' mother, who awakes after her death to discover she is in a form of afterlife called the Everywhen. There, she encounters gods and legends from across mythologies vying for power.
paragraphs.cn: 索尼在最近的State of Play上正式公布了下一款《战神》游戏。《战神：劳菲》的主角正是奎托斯的妻子、阿特柔斯的母亲劳菲，她在死后醒来，发现自己身处一种名为「Everywhen」的来世。在那里，她遇到了来自不同神话体系、争夺权力的众神和传说人物。

paragraphs.en: The reveal trailer already clarified that this game will take place over the course of God of War (2018) and Ragnarok, potentially hinting at moments where Faye supports her family on the journey she lined up for them. Unfortunately there's no sense of a release date quite yet, but you can check out our full interview with the game's creators for a deeper dive.
paragraphs.cn: 预告片已经明确，这款游戏将发生在《战神》（2018）和《诸神黄昏》的时间线中，可能暗示了劳菲在她为家人安排的旅程中支持他们的时刻。遗憾的是，目前还没有发售日期的消息，但你可以查看我们对游戏创作者的完整采访以了解更多细节。
